Package org.eventb.core.basis

Class EventBElement

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Action, Axiom, CarrierSet, Constant, Event, EventBPOElement, EventBRoot, ExtendsContext, Guard, Invariant, Parameter, POSequent, POSource, RefinesMachine, SCAssignmentElement, SCEvent, SCExpressionElement, SCExtendsContext, SCIdentifierElement, SCPredicateElement, SCRefinesEvent, SCRefinesMachine, SCSeesContext, SeesContext, TestChildElement, TestParentElement, Variable, Variant, Witness
public abstract class EventBElement extends InternalElement
Common implementation for Event-B elements.

This implementation is intended to be sub-classed by clients.

Since:
1.0
